miscTables.descr: insert into TransX (Flex1, KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, Contract, Amt1) (select 'UNKNOWN' as Flex1, KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, left(BusCat,1) as BusCat, Contract, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, left(BusCat,1), Contract)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1320000' and Co <> '2999'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 2'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'xxx FX P&L' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'FX P&L'
update TransX set Flex2 = Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on TP = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'TP Grp 3'
update TransX set Flex2 = Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Co = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'TP Grp 1' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Contract = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'TP Grp 2' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on PC = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'TP Grp 4' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex3 = '(1) FF001' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(2) InterCo' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2400','2450','3030','3070','3075')
update TransX set Flex3 = '(3) Elim' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999'

insert into TransX (Flex3, KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, TPname, BusCat, Contract, Flex1, Flex2, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (select '(2) InterCo' as Flex3, KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, 'copy' as TPname, BusCat, Contract, Flex1, Flex2, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and TP in ('2300','2400','2450'))

insert into TransX (Flex3, KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, TPname, BusCat, Contract, Flex1, Flex2, Amt1) (select '(2) InterCo' as Flex3, KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, 'copy' as TPname, BusCat, Contract, Flex1, Flex2, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2001' and TP in ('3030','3070','3075'))
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, Amt1, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
